title: 皐月賞の後に・吹きすさむは

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The whole time I was running, I felt a powerful
tingling sensation. A kind of electricity that raced
across my neck... my hands... my back... my legs...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno's ragged breaths and my own gasps
echoed in my head.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And my chest filled to bursting with the
determination not to lose...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And coming in first, it's Sakura Chiyono O! Sakura
Chiyono O has taken the win!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I did iiiiit!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Woooo!
Waaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Huh? I can hear another voice mixed in with the
crowd's cheers...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Why, why, why?! I couldn't overtake her! I didn't have enough strength!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Why?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Oh, that's right... Yaeno swore she wasn't going
to lose...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(A vow like that must feel so rewarding to
uphold... but so painful to break.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: So this is what it's like to race against a rival...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That's right. This is the reality of competition.
That hair-raising cry of everything you are in this
moment...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
When the time comes next, I will be there running
alongside you. I will carve out my very own
moment at the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we return to the waiting room, I can't help
but notice Sakura Chiyono O seems unusually
quiet and pensive.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I think I finally understand what it means
to race in the Classics. And what it's like... to
battle against a rival.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Your body is tense with energy till the very end,
and you have to use every ounce of strength to
push yourself forward.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...You pour so much of yourself into the race that
if you lose, it's painful enough to make you
scream and cry.
choice_data_list: That's what a full-out clash is like.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah. You're right.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I want to win the Derby too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Or rather, it's a race I absolutely don't want to
lose.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I don't care if I have to run against Yaeno again,
or if Ardan pits everything she possibly can
against me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm carrying on the Derby dream, so I won't let
this passion be second to anyone!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... Bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Dad? Why is he calling?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thanks. Sorry to make you step out.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hello? Dad?

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Father
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Chiyo! You worked really hard on your
recovery, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe.... Yeah. I'm almost completely better now.
Oh, speaking of, about the tatami mats back at
home—

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Father
text_block_list.text:
I know. Your mother told me. You sure did a
number on those poor mats.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Eugh... I'm so sorry...

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Father
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry your little head. They're proof of
your hard work.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Father
text_block_list.text:
I ruined a fair number of tatami mats back in my
day too! You and I are peas in a pod! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Dad...

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Father
text_block_list.text:
Chiyo, I heard you're going to compete in the
Derby. Is there something special you want to
accomplish there?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, there is.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
There's a dream I want to fulfill. A dream that
someone I look up to entrusted to me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not the only racer who's devoted all my
time and heart to winning.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My rivals are just as determined not to lose to
anyone.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That's why the Derby is so important to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is her dream race—the Japanese
Derby.
